title: Raise everyone’s income by 10 percent
textParagraph: A 10 percent increase in everyone’s income will [emphasis: increase ]the average income by $2 from $20 to $22. As a result, the Prosperity Gap [emphasis: decreases] by 10 percent from 4.5 to 4.0.
source: Authors’ calculation, Poverty and Inequality Platform (version March 2026).
reality: Initial level of income and Prosperity Gap
visdescription: This chart reports the changes in average income and Prosperity Gap for a scenario where everyone’s income is raised by 10 percent.
